scripts.clean: pnpm -r run clean && pnpm -r exec rm -rf node_modules && rm -rf node_modules bin
scripts.pack: pnpm -r run build && BIN_DIR="$(pwd)/bin" && mkdir -p "$BIN_DIR" && for pkg in packages/* packages/other/*; do [ -f "$pkg/package.json" ] || continue; (cd "$pkg" && npm pack && mv *.tgz "$BIN_DIR"/ 2>/dev/null || true); done
